data.acceptance:
- A 'Groom' button is present in the Create New flow after a beat is created
- Clicking Groom triggers grooming on the beat and shows a pending/loading state while it runs
- A 'Take' button appears (or becomes enabled) only after grooming completes successfully
- Clicking Take begins work on the beat (equivalent to the existing Take action)
- If grooming fails, the Take button does not become available and an error is surfaced
- The sequence cannot be bypassed (Take is not accessible before Groom completes)
